title: Traceability coverage computation + traceability.json
definition_of_done: Compute(state) returns Coverage with TotalNodes/CitedNodes/CoveragePct/Uncited; Write/Read to traceability.json; pipeline writes traceability.json; TestCoverage* passes
outcome: Coverage struct with Compute/Write/Read; pipeline writes traceability.json; import cycle resolved via IssueRef adapter; TestCoverage* (3 tests) pass

notes.msg: Implemented traceability coverage: Coverage{TotalNodes, CitedNodes, CoveragePct, Uncited []string} in internal/traceability/traceability.go. Compute() accepts []IssueRef (cycle-safe), Write/Read to traceability.json (atomic). Pipeline writes traceability.json after materialization in both Materialize and MaterializeAndReturn. TestCoverageAllCited, TestCoverageNoneCited, TestCoveragePartial all pass. go build ./... clean.
